description: In ESA SNAP Desktop, process the Landsat multispectral image at ~/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. Compute a vegetation index band named 'ndvi' using the formula (band_2 - band_3) / (band_2 + band_3). Create a mask to isolate dense vegetation where 'ndvi > 0.4' and convert this mask into vector geometries. Export the vector data as an ESRI Shapefile to ~/snap_exports/dense_vegetation.shp and save the project in BEAM-DIMAP format to ~/snap_projects/vegetation_analysis.dim.
